summary: The diff implements comprehensive testing and fixes for a Persian-language shopping search application with blue neon styling and RTL support. Changes span frontend components (Header, SearchInput, ProductResults, StoreManagement) and styling files. Most requirements are addressed through UI enhancements, RTL improvements, and blue neon theme consistency, but the diff lacks evidence of actual testing execution or backend testing.

missing_requirements.requirement: Test the searchByProductTitle functionality in the backend with various Persian product queries and verify that results are returned with correct title, price, store name, and city information
missing_requirements.reason: No evidence of backend testing implementation. The diff shows frontend changes and styling updates but contains no test files, test execution logs, or backend verification code for searchByProductTitle with Persian queries.
